---
title: "Woodworking"
search: false
format:
  html:
    meta:
      description: "A small gallery of woodworking and home projects by Ben Brintz."
---

::: {=html}
<style>
body {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background-color: #030a1c;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 82%, rgba(255, 120, 40, 0.24), transparent 38%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 22% 22%, rgba(102, 195, 255, 0.24), transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.9) 0%, rgba(8, 14, 38, 0.84) 48%, rgba(11, 24, 53, 0.92) 100%);
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  color: #f8fbff;
}

h1.title {
  color: #f8fbff;
}

.wood-intro {
  max-width: 720px;
  color: #dbe6ff;
  line-height: 1.65;
  font-size: 1.04rem;
}

.wood-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 1.6rem 0 3rem;
}

.wood-card {
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
}

.wood-open {
  appearance: none;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: zoom-in;
}

.wood-card img {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 180ms ease, filter 180ms ease;
}

.wood-card:hover img,
.wood-open:focus-visible img {
  transform: scale(1.025);
  filter: saturate(1.05);
}

.wood-open:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid rgba(126, 199, 255, 0.64);
  outline-offset: -3px;
}

.wood-card figcaption {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.18rem;
  padding: 0.8rem 0.9rem 0.95rem;
  background: rgba(3, 10, 28, 0.78);
}

.wood-card figcaption strong {
  color: #ffffff;
}

.wood-card figcaption span {
  color: #c9d8f0;
  line-height: 1.45;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
}

#lightbox[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

#lightbox {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  z-index: 9999;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  background: rgba(2, 6, 18, 0.86);
}

#lightbox img {
  max-width: min(92vw, 1100px);
  max-height: 82vh;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
}

.lightbox-close {
  position: fixed;
  top: 1rem;
  right: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.28);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.45rem 0.78rem;
  color: #f8fbff;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  font-weight: 700;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .wood-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
:::

::: {.wood-intro}
A small collection of practical builds: shelves, benches, storage, and other projects where the design is mostly in the joinery and finish.
:::

<div class="wood-grid">
  <figure class="wood-card">
    <button class="wood-open" type="button" data-full="images/project1.jpg" aria-label="Open walnut corner shelves image">
      <picture>
        <source srcset="images/project1.webp" type="image/webp">
        <img src="images/project1.jpg" alt="Dark walnut corner shelves mounted beside a colorful painting" loading="lazy">
      </picture>
    </button>
    <figcaption>
      <strong>Walnut corner shelves</strong>
      <span>Compact wall storage with a stepped profile.</span>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
  <figure class="wood-card">
    <button class="wood-open" type="button" data-full="images/project2.jpg" aria-label="Open bench frame in progress image">
      <picture>
        <source srcset="images/project2.webp" type="image/webp">
        <img src="images/project2.jpg" alt="Unfinished wooden bench frame in a workshop" loading="lazy">
      </picture>
    </button>
    <figcaption>
      <strong>Bench frame in progress</strong>
      <span>A shop-stage look at layout, proportion, and structure.</span>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
  <figure class="wood-card">
    <button class="wood-open" type="button" data-full="images/project3.jpg" aria-label="Open entryway bench and coat rail image">
      <picture>
        <source srcset="images/project3.webp" type="image/webp">
        <img src="images/project3.jpg" alt="Entryway bench with coat hooks and hanging jackets" loading="lazy">
      </picture>
    </button>
    <figcaption>
      <strong>Entryway bench and rail</strong>
      <span>Built-in storage for the daily pileup of coats and bags.</span>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
  <figure class="wood-card">
    <button class="wood-open" type="button" data-full="images/project4.jpg" aria-label="Open kitchen shelf image">
      <picture>
        <source srcset="images/project4.webp" type="image/webp">
        <img src="images/project4.jpg" alt="Small wooden kitchen shelf holding glass jars" loading="lazy">
      </picture>
    </button>
    <figcaption>
      <strong>Kitchen shelf</strong>
      <span>A narrow shelf for keeping jars useful and visible.</span>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
  <figure class="wood-card">
    <button class="wood-open" type="button" data-full="images/project5.jpeg" aria-label="Open serving flight board image">
      <picture>
        <source srcset="images/project5.webp" type="image/webp">
        <img src="images/project5.jpeg" alt="Wooden serving board holding several small glasses" loading="lazy">
      </picture>
    </button>
    <figcaption>
      <strong>Serving flight board</strong>
      <span>A small, tactile build for gathering around a table.</span>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
</div>

<div id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Woodworking project image" hidden>
  <button class="lightbox-close" type="button">Close</button>
  <img src="" alt="">
</div>

<script>
  (function () {
    const lightbox = document.getElementById("lightbox");
    const lightboxImg = lightbox.querySelector("img");
    const closeButton = lightbox.querySelector(".lightbox-close");

    function closeLightbox() {
      lightbox.hidden = true;
      lightboxImg.src = "";
      lightboxImg.alt = "";
    }

    document.querySelectorAll(".wood-open").forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener("click", () => {
        const img = button.querySelector("img");
        lightboxImg.src = button.dataset.full || img.src;
        lightboxImg.alt = img.alt;
        lightbox.hidden = false;
        closeButton.focus();
      });
    });

    closeButton.addEventListener("click", closeLightbox);
    lightbox.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      if (event.target === lightbox) closeLightbox();
    });
    document.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
      if (event.key === "Escape" && !lightbox.hidden) closeLightbox();
    });
  })();
</script>
